reviews.comment:
Tendría que cero estrella por la demora en atención, estuve más de 1 hora 30 min esperando para cargar combustible. Un solo surtidor, doble fila de autos esperando. Segunda vez que cargo en esta ypf y el mismo problema. Muy lentos!

(Translated by Google)
I'd give it zero stars because of the slow service. I waited over an hour and a half to get fuel. Only one pump, and a double line of cars waiting. This is the second time I've filled up at this YPF station and had the same problem. Very slow!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNTZYUDR3RRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, algo lenta por momentos. Solo había un playero. El postnet no funcionaba en una isla y eso demoraba aún más la atención. No cuentan con un pago por QR, como así tampoco la app de YPF. Los baños limpios y la atención del playero muy buena.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, though a bit slow at times. There was only one attendant. The card reader wasn't working at one of the pump islands, which slowed things down even more. They don't accept QR code payments, nor do they have the YPF app. The restrooms were clean, and the attendant was very helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtM0lpZTRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Coloco una estrella solo por que tienen combustible. Pero en enero de 2022 hay una sola playera para despachar en 2 surtidores de nafta y 2 de gasoil,  por lo que la demora es de más de 2 hs, teniendo que hacer fila en una de las calles más transitadas del pueblo. No se como el ACA permite esto

(Translated by Google)
I'm giving it one star only because they have fuel. But in January 2022, there's only one attendant to pump two gasoline and two diesel pumps, so the wait is over two hours, and you have to wait in line on one of the busiest streets in town. I don't know how the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) allows this.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcmRhZGdnRRAB
